ogTitle: Hardys Bay vs Harefield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hardys Bay and Harefield.
heading: Hardys Bay vs Harefield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hardys Bay, New South Wales and Harefield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hardys Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Harefield (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hardys Bay or Harefield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hardys Bay has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Harefield scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hardys Bay scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Harefield scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hardys Bay or Harefield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hardys Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
